description: Folo built-in feeds split by view type

feeds.title: Andrew Huberman - YouTube
feeds.descriptionZh: 斯坦福神经科学教授，专注睡眠、压力与健康科学的播客频道
feeds.descriptionEn: Stanford neuroscientist covering sleep, stress and health science

feeds.title: Lex Fridman - YouTube
feeds.descriptionZh: MIT 研究员，深度访谈 AI、科学与人类未来的长篇播客

feeds.descriptionEn: Theoretical physicist explaining frontier physics and scientific controversies

feeds.descriptionZh: TED 每日精选演讲，涵盖科技、设计、人文等领域
